title: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra
intro: A mantra dedicated to Lord Shiva, chanted for health, protection and longevity.
description:
|| Mahamrityunjaya Mantra ||
Om Tryambakam Yajamahe Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam.
Urvarukamiva Bandhanaan Mrityor Mukshiya Maamritaat.
meaning: This mantra is a prayer to Lord Shiva for protection from illness, fear and death.

faq.q1: When should the Mahamrityunjaya Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Early morning and on Mondays are considered especially auspicious.
faq.q2: What are the benefits of this mantra?
faq.a2: It is chanted for health, peace of mind and protection.
